title: Project Roadmap
scenario: Create a project roadmap for a new software development project with the following milestones: Requirements Gathering, Design, Development, Testing, and Deployment. The roadmap should include a brief description of each milestone and a rough estimate of the time required for each milestone. The output should be a clear and concise table summarizing the project timeline.
constraints: Must include a title and a table with at least 5 columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is under 250 words and includes a title and a table with at least 5 columns.
Check if the table is correctly formatted and has a clear structure.
Check if the description of each milestone is clear and concise.
